prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在120–131区间，属中游偏上211层次；该校在声誉文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第105，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量较低，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业涵盖金融学类、会计学、计算机类、电气工程等，与优势学科关联紧密。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，辽宁大学相关专业招生吸引力较强；福建省物理类考生2021年11.7万→2025年19.2万持续增长，2026年总考生26.79万，按历史比例估算物理类约20.4万（较2025年+6.1%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线（本科批）2021年423→2025年441，波动平稳；辽宁大学位于东北沈阳，对福建考生属跨省远距离报考，地域偏好因素偏中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年继续扩招10人（+24.4%）的缓解效应、以及福建省物理类考生增加约1.2万（+6.1%）的竞争加剧效应，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解；但2025年位次已大幅后移，2026年扩招后位次预计继续后移但幅度收窄。预测最低位次约25087名，区间24587–25587名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16670 → 17799 → 18252 → 17567 → 22059, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 4492 places compared to 2024, with significantly increased volatility. The baseline for 2025 is about 22059. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 22 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 18 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and 51 in 2026. There was a substantial expansion of 23 places in 2025, and a further expansion of 10 places (+24.4%) in 2026. The continuous expansion has somewhat alleviated competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 125th, with a stable ranking in the 120–131 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation file, and public opinion is stable. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 105th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and no abnormal surge in application interest. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. The enrollment majors include Finance, Accounting, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc., closely related to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and Liaoning University's related majors have strong appeal to applicants. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province grew from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with a total of 267,900 examinees in 2026. Estimated Physics Category examinees are about 204,000 (an increase of 6.1% compared to 2025), and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 423 in 2021 and 441 in 2025, showing stable fluctuations. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Northeast China, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Fujian examinees, and regional preference factors are neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a further expansion of 10 places (+24.4%) in 2026, and the intensifying competition from an increase of about 12,000 Physics Category examinees (+6.1%) in Fujian Province, the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, leading to a slight easing of overall competition. However, the ranking has already shifted significantly backward in 2025, and after the expansion in 2026, the ranking is expected to continue shifting backward but at a reduced rate. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25087, with a range of 24587–25587.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 25087, with a range of 24587–25587. If your ranking falls within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Accounting) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 24000), you can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (outside 25500), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

The baseline for 2025 is about 3889. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 13 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 15 in 2025, and 25 in 2026. In 2025, enrollment expanded by 6, and in 2026 it continued to expand by 10 (+66.7%). Two consecutive years of significant expansion have notably alleviated competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. History Category majors include Accounting, Finance, Economics, and Finance, closely linked to its advantageous disciplines.

预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the notable alleviation effect of a large enrollment expansion of 10 (+66.7%) in 2026, and the slight increase in competition due to about 3,800 more History Category examinees in Fujian (+6.2%), the expansion far exceeds the increase in examinees, significantly easing competition, and rankings are expected to continue shifting backward.
